task_objective: Fix status strip visibility over running games and add diagnostic logging.
tests_added: Updated frontend static tests to verify diagnostic logs, increased stacking order, and hardened BrowserView synchronization sequence.
design_decisions: Added explicit logs for the composition hook and BrowserView creation paths to help diagnose on-device failures.
Increased BrowserView stacking order to 2 to ensure it clears standard SteamUI overlays.
Used a safer initialization sequence (Bounds -> Load -> Visible) with a slight delay for visibility to allow LoadURL to register.
Improved overlay contrast by increasing background opacity and ensuring full color saturation for text.
results: Frontend static tests, type checking, and linting passed on the new feature branch.
